groups.title: Publishing & Evidence
groups.description: Release notes, delivery evidence, and publishing history that stay out of the customer workspace.

groups.title: Automation Lab
groups.description: Future product tools and experimental drafting workflows that still need workshop time before they graduate.

groups.title: Agent Lab
groups.description: Experimental agent workflows, pairing, and orchestration surfaces that stay outside the released product story.

groups.title: Architecture & Code
groups.description: Repo maps, graph views, and refactor tooling for engineering follow-through.

groups.title: Developer Docs
groups.description: Runbooks, sketches, and workshop guidance that support local development and staged rollout work.

tools.title: Changelog
tools.description: Developer publishing ledger, work evidence, and draft notes.

tools.description: Markup-driven CAD automation workspace with review-first compare and execution flows.

tools.title: AutoWire
tools.description: Deterministic wire and conduit routing workflows staged as a future customer-facing automation surface.

tools.title: Ground Grid Generation
tools.description: Grounding geometry capture and generation workflows that still need lab-stage refinement.

tools.description: Review-first drawing cleanup plus file and CAD replacement from one local workshop surface.

tools.title: Agents
tools.description: Experimental profile-driven orchestration and paired-device agent workflows.

tools.description: Hotspot and refactor map for repo structure, extraction pressure, and module ownership.

tools.title: Architecture Graph
tools.description: Alternative node-link explorer for the same architecture and memory model used in the map.

tools.title: Developer Docs
tools.description: Runbooks, environment notes, and workshop guidance that should not ship as customer-facing knowledge content.
